items.headline: Nahid Rana shows there's more to him than just pace
items.description: His 5 for 32 was the performance of an express bowler and a thinking bowler rolled into one

items.headline: Cowboys give Brandon Aubrey 4-year deal averaging $7M per season
items.description: Brandon Aubrey and the Cowboys reached agreement Monday on a deal that will make him the highest-paid kicker in NFL history, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.headline: WNBA draft: Mystics, Storm, Lynx and Wings get top marks
items.description: One team set the curve with an A+. Three got A grades, including Dallas for picking Azzi Fudd. But one got a D.

items.description: One of the biggest music festivals each year came and went with big name athletes taking in the desert.

items.headline: Marco Rose to replace Andoni Iraola as Bournemouth head coach
items.description: Bournemouth have confirmed Marco Rose will replace the departing Andoni Iraola at the end of the season.

items.headline: John Korir wins 2nd straight Boston Marathon in course record time
items.description: Defending champion John Korir broke the Boston Marathon course record Monday, riding a tailwind to outrun the fastest field in event history and win in an unofficial 2 hours, 1 minute, 52 seconds for his second straight victory.

items.headline: Every team's odds to win the 2026 World Series: Dodgers still favorites over Yankees, Mariners
items.description: Every MLB team's odds to win the 2026 World Series, led by the Dodgers and followed by the Yankees and Mariners.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona step up interest in Italy right back
items.description: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

items.description: The deadline for teams to pick up the fifth-year option on rookie contracts is May 1. Which players have had their options picked up?

items.description: A round-up of all the action from Matchweek 9 of ISL 2026.

items.headline: Michael Carrick has Man United fans 'excited' again - Ryan Giggs
items.description: Ryan Giggs has said Michael Carrick has brought excitement back to Old Trafford but believes sacked Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim left the team in a "pretty good place."

items.headline: Duke center Patrick Ngongba returning for next season
items.description: Duke starting center Patrick Ngongba II is returning to the Blue Devils next season.
